overview: Survival horror extraction game set in the Carpathian Mountains. Players explore a mysterious zone filled with supernatural threats, scavenging resources while managing sanity and survival needs.
coreMechanics: Extraction-based gameplay (get in, loot, get out)
Dynamic threat AI responding to player behavior
Permanent death with partial item recovery

terminology.Expedition: A single run into the zone
terminology.Extraction Point: Safe zones to exit with your loot

commonQuestions: Should I go solo or with a team?
How do I manage my inventory?
Can I recover my gear after death?
insiderTips: Don't get greedy - extract before sanity hits critical
Sound discipline is crucial - entities track noise
Mark extraction points early in your run
Light sources attract threats but are necessary
Insure valuable gear before risky expeditions
Weather affects visibility and enemy behavior
Group up with other players for better survival odds

progressionSystem.metaProgression: Unlocked loadout options and base upgrades
progressionSystem.knowledge: Learning enemy patterns and zone layout

survivalTips.sanity: Rest in safe areas, avoid looking at anomalies
survivalTips.threats: Learn escape routes, don't engage unless necessary
survivalTips.extraction: Know multiple exit points, don't rely on one

estimatedPlaytime: Ongoing - extraction game loop, 20-60 minutes per run
